action.reasoning: Observation: The training script continues to crash with exit code 139 (segmentation fault). The current model architecture is still complex and may be causing memory issues. The main problems are: 1) The model processes temporal and spatial dimensions in a complex way that might be causing issues. 2) The reshaping operations might be incorrect. 3) The combination of LSTM and GCN layers might be too complex. I need to simplify the model significantly to avoid these crashes. I'll create a much simpler model that processes the spatiotemporal data in a more straightforward way.
